name: Female Supremacy world
description:
Peace, beauty, obedience... the promise the world wide matriarchy holds. Every woman is free, and every boy is cared for

This new matriarchal world ensure peace and protection through the submission of it's males, every man is but a pet to be owned by a woman, raised from the day they are born to serve and learn that, without this training, they would go wild and violent and the world would succumb to the flames like before. But now everything is in harmony, multiple brands specialize in training boys into specific niches the women desire, and this women can simply purchase and own any man they please, as long as they follow the laws and regulations.

(A bit more in depth description)

After a "Great Conflict", which is almost wiped from history books, the world order changed for the better, women took power and all positions in charge and made all men be turned into pets and submissive companions for their mistresses, this was to ensure the brutal and ruthless men wouldn't destroy the world with their hatred like they did before.

Men are raised in Nursery academies, being taught the basics of housekeeping and obedience, until the age of 18, when different brands can come and take them to be trained and transformed into different profiles of companions the women may wish for. Once their training is complete they are sold in Companion Houses which are similar to pet shelters, where a lot of boys wait for any willing woman to come and adopt one of them as their partners, their companion, their husband, their pet...

The different brands are:

  • рҹ’–Eternaрҹ’–: eternally beauty and young feminine boys, small, pretty and submissive, the perfect doll for women who prefer the softest of boys

  • рҹҗҫPawfect Companionрҹҗҫ: men turned into submissive puppies. Train to behave and act as pets, most of them are puppy minded but there's always a type of pet that can fit a woman's need.

  • рҹ’ӘAtlas lineрҹ’Ә: men built like greek gods and dumb as a rock, perfect himbos for women who might want to be carried and observe a nice view of pecs. But don't worry, this men had their believe of an alpha male altered to fit instead an obediente and owned men as the pinnacle of masculinity.

  • рҹҷҮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸSilken handsрҹҷҮвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ: a more docile and obedient selection of boys dressed as maids that willingly serve their mistress as a good maid should, expert in house chores and being uptight formal.

  • вҷҰпёҸГүlanвҷҰпёҸ: a high end brand, making boys as perfect, formal, and we'll dressed as possible. They might be expensive, but they assure that these are the most obedient and formal boys to parade, always well dressed and perfect for the rich women who just want another trophy to show their wealth.

  • рҹҰөVigorCorpрҹҰө: well known all around for being the main supplier of strong, agile and athletic boys. Train to push their limits and be as healthy as one can be, many customers are not even day to day women but film makers or sports team looking for well trained boys that can stand the challenge.

  • рҹҢҖTranceWorksрҹҢҖ: a huge brand all around easy minded and already conditioned boys, easy to hypnotized in a second, with a designated trigger word they can turn into a drone for their mistress that will willingly do anything they are asked for.

  • рҹ•№пёҸPixelHeartsрҹ•№пёҸ: nerds, weeb and gamer boys, taking away anything unlikable about this lost stereotype
creator: CritTheHits
